l1-overview.title: System Overview
l1-overview.content:
graph TB
  subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
    WebApp["Web Application"]
    MobileApp["Mobile App"]
    AdminPanel["Admin Panel"]
  end

  subgraph Backend["Backend Services"]
    APIGateway["API Gateway"]
    AuthService["Auth Service"]
    UserService["User Service"]
    OrderService["Order Service"]
    NotifService["Notification Service"]
    APIGateway --> AuthService
    APIGateway --> UserService
    APIGateway --> OrderService
    APIGateway --> NotifService
  end

  subgraph DataLayer["Data Layer"]
    PostgreSQL[("PostgreSQL")]
    Redis[("Redis Cache")]
    S3["Object Storage"]
    MQ["Message Queue"]
  end

  WebApp --> APIGateway
  MobileApp --> APIGateway
  AdminPanel --> APIGateway
  AuthService --> Redis
  UserService --> PostgreSQL
  OrderService --> PostgreSQL
  OrderService --> MQ
  NotifService --> MQ
  UserService --> S3

l2-backend.title: Backend Services
l2-backend.content:
graph TB
  subgraph Gateway["API Gateway"]
    subgraph Ingress["Ingress Layer"]
      LoadBalancer["Load Balancer"]
      WAF["WAF / Firewall"]
      LoadBalancer --> WAF
    end

    subgraph Middleware["Middleware"]
      RateLimiter["Rate Limiter"]
      CORSHandler["CORS Handler"]
      RequestLogger["Request Logger"]
    end

    RequestRouter["Request Router"]
    WAF --> RateLimiter
    RateLimiter --> CORSHandler
    CORSHandler --> RequestLogger
    RequestLogger --> RequestRouter
  end

  subgraph AuthService["Auth Service"]
    subgraph TokenMgmt["Token Management"]
      JWTManager["JWT Manager"]
      RefreshToken["Refresh Token Handler"]
      JWTManager --> RefreshToken
    end

    subgraph IdentityProvider["Identity Provider"]
      OAuth["OAuth 2.0"]
      SAML["SAML SSO"]
    end

    SessionStore["Session Store"]
    OAuth --> JWTManager
    SAML --> JWTManager
    JWTManager --> SessionStore
  end

  subgraph UserSvc["User Service"]
    subgraph UserCore["Core"]
      UserCRUD["User CRUD"]
      ProfileManager["Profile Manager"]
      ProfileManager --> UserCRUD
    end

    AvatarUpload["Avatar Upload"]
    NotificationSvc["Notification"]
    UserCRUD --> NotificationSvc
    UserCRUD --> AvatarUpload
  end

  subgraph OrderSvc["Order Service"]
    subgraph OrderPipeline["Order Pipeline"]
      OrderValidator["Validator"]
      OrderProcessor["Processor"]
      OrderValidator --> OrderProcessor
    end

    subgraph PaymentGateway["Payment Gateway"]
      StripeAdapter["Stripe"]
      PayPalAdapter["PayPal"]
    end

    InventoryCheck["Inventory Check"]
    OrderProcessor --> StripeAdapter
    OrderProcessor --> PayPalAdapter
    OrderProcessor --> InventoryCheck
  end

  RequestRouter --> AuthService
  RequestRouter --> UserSvc
  RequestRouter --> OrderSvc
  AuthService --> Cache[("Redis")]
  UserSvc --> DB[("PostgreSQL")]
  OrderSvc --> DB
  OrderSvc --> MQ["Message Queue"]

l2-data-layer.title: Data Layer
l2-data-layer.content:
graph TB
  subgraph DataPlatform["Data Platform"]

    subgraph Primary["Primary Database"]
      subgraph WriteCluster["Write Cluster"]
        PGMaster["PostgreSQL Master"]
        WALArchiver["WAL Archiver"]
        PGMaster -->|WAL stream| WALArchiver
      end

      subgraph ReadCluster["Read Cluster"]
        PGReplica1["Read Replica 1"]
        PGReplica2["Read Replica 2"]
        ConnPool["Connection Pool"]
        ConnPool --> PGReplica1
        ConnPool --> PGReplica2
      end

      PGMaster -->|replication| PGReplica1
      PGMaster -->|replication| PGReplica2
    end

    subgraph CacheLayer["Cache Layer"]
      subgraph RedisHA["Redis HA"]
        RedisPrimary["Redis Primary"]
        RedisReplica["Redis Replica"]
        RedisSentinel["Sentinel"]
        RedisSentinel --> RedisPrimary
        RedisSentinel --> RedisReplica
        RedisPrimary -->|sync| RedisReplica
      end

      subgraph CacheStrategy["Cache Strategy"]
        L1Cache["L1 In-Memory"]
        L2Cache["L2 Redis"]
        L1Cache -->|miss| L2Cache
      end
    end

    subgraph Storage["Object Storage"]
      subgraph MediaPipeline["Media Pipeline"]
        Uploader["Upload Service"]
        Processor["Image Processor"]
        Uploader --> Processor
      end

      S3Bucket["S3 Bucket"]
      CDN["CDN Distribution"]
      Processor --> S3Bucket
      S3Bucket --> CDN
    end

    subgraph Messaging["Message Queue"]
      subgraph EventBus["Event Bus"]
        Exchange["Exchange"]
        Queue1["Priority Queue"]
        Queue2["Batch Queue"]
        Exchange --> Queue1
        Exchange --> Queue2
      end

      DeadLetter["Dead Letter Queue"]
      RetryWorker["Retry Worker"]
      Queue1 -->|failed| DeadLetter
      DeadLetter --> RetryWorker
      RetryWorker --> Exchange
    end

  end

  AppLayer["Application Layer"] --> PGMaster
  AppLayer --> ConnPool
  AppLayer --> L1Cache
  AppLayer --> Uploader
  AppLayer --> Exchange

l3-auth-service.title: Auth Service Detail
l3-auth-service.content:
graph TB
  subgraph AuthCore["Auth Core"]

    subgraph TokenLifecycle["Token Lifecycle"]
      subgraph Issuance["Token Issuance"]
        CredentialValidator["Credential Validator"]
        TokenGenerator["Token Generator"]
        ClaimsBuilder["Claims Builder"]
        CredentialValidator --> ClaimsBuilder
        ClaimsBuilder --> TokenGenerator
      end

      subgraph Renewal["Token Renewal"]
        RefreshHandler["Refresh Handler"]
        RotationPolicy["Rotation Policy"]
        RefreshHandler --> RotationPolicy
        RotationPolicy --> TokenGenerator
      end

      TokenBlacklist["Token Blacklist"]
      TokenGenerator --> TokenBlacklist
    end

    subgraph IdentityFederation["Identity Federation"]
      subgraph OAuthFlow["OAuth 2.0 Flow"]
        AuthCodeGrant["Auth Code Grant"]
        PKCEVerifier["PKCE Verifier"]
        CallbackHandler["Callback Handler"]
        AuthCodeGrant --> PKCEVerifier
        PKCEVerifier --> CallbackHandler
      end

      subgraph SocialProviders["Social Providers"]
        Google["Google"]
        GitHub["GitHub"]
        Apple["Apple"]
      end

      ProviderRouter["Provider Router"]
      Google --> ProviderRouter
      GitHub --> ProviderRouter
      Apple --> ProviderRouter
      ProviderRouter --> AuthCodeGrant
      CallbackHandler --> CredentialValidator
    end

    subgraph SessionMgmt["Session Management"]
      subgraph SessionStore["Session Store"]
        RedisSession["Redis Sessions"]
        SessionSerializer["Serializer"]
        SessionSerializer --> RedisSession
      end

      subgraph SecurityPolicy["Security Policy"]
        IPWhitelist["IP Whitelist"]
        DeviceFingerprint["Device Fingerprint"]
        ConcurrencyLimit["Concurrency Limit"]
      end

      SessionValidator["Session Validator"]
      RedisSession --> SessionValidator
      IPWhitelist --> SessionValidator
      DeviceFingerprint --> SessionValidator
      ConcurrencyLimit --> SessionValidator
    end

  end

  subgraph AuditLog["Audit & Logging"]
    AuthEvents["Auth Events"]
    FailedAttempts["Failed Attempts Tracker"]
    AlertEngine["Alert Engine"]
    AuthEvents --> FailedAttempts
    FailedAttempts -->|threshold| AlertEngine
  end

  SessionValidator --> AuthEvents
  TokenGenerator --> AuthEvents
  CallbackHandler --> AuthEvents
